legacy.content:
# Phase 44-01 Summary: KAPLAY Atomic Component Library Baseline
## Done
- Added atom-level button/keycap primitives and routed button rendering through atom helpers. - Added molecule-level key legend rendering for keyboard discoverability. - Established a reusable grid frame helper (`renderGridFrame`) that composes: - left command panel organism - center scene content area - right room brief + journal surface - Refit grid scenes (navigation, combat, action menu, rune forge, inventory, dialogue) to shared shell composition. - Kept first-person and grid on the same three-column shell model. - Updated roadmap with the next five planned phases (44-48).
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/kaplay-demo run build` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run typecheck` - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run test:parity-smoke`
